title: The DISTURBING History Of Skinwalker Ranch Revealed

transcript.text: welcome to Skinwalker Ranch the world's
greatest and most freaky paranormal hot
spot located in the Uinta Basin in
western Utah if you think Sedona Arizona
Dolce New Mexico and Joshua Tree
California are trippy just wait until
you learn about skin walk
first a little bit of history in the
19th century the area primarily
consisted of two Indian tribes the
Navajo and the Utes during the Civil War
the Utes partnered with the U.S
government in a battle against the
Navajo suffering a brutal defeat and
feeling betrayed the Navajo cursed the
local land with Skin Walkers
what are skinwalkers you might ask
malevolent shape-shifting entities that
can take various forms but often
resemble demonic werewolves
